title: cross_engine r4 deeper integration plan — r4 replan ω-cycle witnesses + dossier + geo-mean invariant import into hexa_sim atlas vocabulary
trigger: F126-F132 cross-engine integration covers tool/r4_replan.py via F128 (geo_mean=0.707 runtime) + r4_bench/MANIFEST.json via F129 (SHA); r4 system internals (5 ω-cycle witnesses + closed-loop dossier + 1 load-bearing geo-mean invariant) remain unanchored. Same B+C pattern as m3 deeper plan (cross_engine_m3_deeper_integration_plan.json), m3 fixpoint.next_omega_cycle_trigger explicitly named r4 as next target.

r4_source_artifacts.role: Python reference impl 241 LoC — vstar SCC contraction + 3 strategies + UCB1 MCTS
5-fixture harness — geo_mean + worst-case + action match assertions
5-fixture manifest with sha256 per file + expected_T_star envelopes
5 canonical DAG fixtures — JSON-only schema-first ground truth
spec-first fixture-witness ω-cycle (i5a1 realization — 5 fixtures + manifest deliverable witness)
i1 MCTS rollout policy ω-cycle (UCB1 c=√2 + depth≤3 + rollouts≤32 + reward bound)
i3 budget envelope ω-cycle (wall-clock + rollout cap + atomic rollback)
i4 atomic apply ω-cycle (in-memory clone + delta accept-or-discard + cycle-check)
i5 benchmark-suite-generator ω-cycle (5-fixture geo-mean falsifier scaffold + worst-case gate)
r4 impl meta ω-cycle (parent — surfaces i1/i3/i4/i5 axes)
r4 Python code-emission ω-cycle (sibling at ω+2 — operationalizes i5a1 with r4_replan.py 241 LoC)
r4 closed-loop design dossier — 7 sections (problem + 3 strategies + MCTS + falsifier + NFL + failure modes + LoC)

r4_invariants_identified_from_dossier_an: I1 geo_mean_drop_threshold_below_1 — falsifier (dossier §4 + r4_replanning_continuous_dossier.md L95): geo_mean(T*_post / T*_pre) < 1 - ε for ε=0.01 across N≥5 triggering DAGs; ≥2 of N regressing falsifies the strategy pool. Currently 0.707 (F128 runtime). Load-bearing — drift > 0.99 = strategy worse than dead path.

I2 mcts_rollout_budget_32 — i3 budget envelope (dossier §3): rollouts ≤ 32 hard cap, depth ≤ 3, wall ≤ 2000ms hard / 1500ms soft warn; tree size ≤ |M|^3 bounded by depth (text-anchored in i3 ω-cycle).
I3 ucb1_c_sqrt_2_textbook — i1 MCTS rollout (dossier §3 L63): UCB1 exploration constant c=√2≈1.41421356 — textbook (Auer 2002), NOT problem-tuned; deviation requires r17 NFL re-derivation.

I4 atomic_in_memory_clone_no_disk_write — i4 atomic apply (dossier §6): roadmap.json on disk NEVER written; apply_delta operates on copy.deepcopy clone; either entire delta accepted or original proceeds to exit(1); no partial mutation surface (raw 77 audit append-only analog).

I5 recursion_guard_replan_depth_le_1 — i4 atomic apply (dossier §6 row 4): mutated DAG schedule() re-triggers replan → replan_depth ≤ 1 guard fires → return None, propagate exit(1); prevents infinite mutation cascade.

I6 reward_clamp_sign_correct_bounded — i1 MCTS (dossier §3 L83): reward(s0,s2) = clamp((s0.T_star - s2.T_star) / max(s0.T_star, ε), -1.0, +1.0); sign-correct (improvement positive), bounded (UCB1 stability requirement).

I7 brent_floor_parallel_split_honors_T_inf — pre-req limit (dossier §Cross-axis touch): parallel_split MUST NOT drive T* below user-declared T_∞ floor on bottleneck node; r15 Brent inviolable (theorem: Brent 1974).

I8 nfl_three_strategies_domain_priors_not_universal — r17 NFL (dossier §5 + Wolpert-Macready 1997): soft_drop / parallel_split / seed_inject = roadmap-domain priors, NOT algorithm priors; on adversarial DAGs lacking annotations → schedule_replan returns None, fallback exit(1) preserved.

I9 manifest_sha256_per_fixture_audit_anchor — i5 benchmark suite (5dag witness deliverables block): MANIFEST.json carries sha256 per fixture file; transitive integrity — fixture mutation breaks F129 grep on 512803099a64 (raw 77 audit append-only).

I10 vstar_scc_contraction_for_soft_cycles — code-emission ω-cycle (ce_a1 axis): Python r4_replan.py vstar EXTENDS hexa schedule() (deps-only) with Tarjan SCC contraction over deps∪soft_deps to handle soft-cycle T*_pre (soft_rich_diamond_drop B↔C cycle); divergence DOCUMENTED, NOT silently fixed; hexa parallel update deferred.

candidate_categorization_for_atlas.OPT_A_strategy_field_S_entries: r4 strategy fields (soft_drop / parallel_split / seed_inject signatures) → @S structure entries. Verdict: REJECTED — duplicates dossier §2 type signatures; F129 already MANIFEST-anchors fixture corpus that exercises strategies; field-level @S adds atlas noise without falsifier leverage (m3 deeper rejected analogous OPT-A).
candidate_categorization_for_atlas.OPT_B_invariant_M_meta_entries: r4 dossier invariants → @M meta-axis entries analog to F132/F160. Each invariant becomes one @M entry in NEW shard atlas.append.r4-deeper-2026-04-26.n6 with grep-based falsifier (cmd-level). Captures load-bearing INVARIANTS not file content. Verdict: SELECTED for I1 (geo-mean drop threshold) — matches m3 deeper pattern of 1 @M per cluster (load-bearing only).
candidate_categorization_for_atlas.OPT_C_omega_cycle_T_trace_entries: r4 ω-cycles + dossier → @T trace entries (verify each artifact exists by SHA). @T r4_5dag_fixtures_omega_v0 / @T r4_i1_mcts_omega_v0 / @T r4_i3_budget_omega_v0 / @T r4_i4_atomic_omega_v0 / @T r4_i5_benchmark_omega_v0 / @T r4_dossier_v0. Each SHA-stable, idempotent, verifies ω-cycle witness reachability. Verdict: SELECTED — covers 6 r4 design artifacts not in F128/F129.
candidate_categorization_for_atlas.chosen: B + C combination (matches m3 deeper plan exactly) — 6 @T file-SHA entries (5 ω-cycles + dossier) + 1 @M meta-axis (I1 geo-mean drop threshold, the load-bearing falsifier). Total 7 atlas entries (matches F126-F132 + F154-F160 cadence). r4_impl_omega_cycle + r4_code_emission_omega_cycle deferred to Tier-2 — meta-parent + sibling-implementation cycles, redundant with i1/i3/i4/i5 children which are the load-bearing axis carriers. Other I-invariants (I2..I10) deferred to Tier-2 — they require dedicated runtime telemetry (rollout counter, reward log, vstar SCC test corpus) not yet on disk; SHA-only anchoring would be premature.

fixpoint.reason: r4 source corpus (12 artifacts) substantively SHA-anchored after merge (F128 tool + F129 manifest + F168-F173 6 deeper); load-bearing geo-mean drop threshold invariant captured as @M meta-axis (F174); other I-invariants explicitly Tier-2 with blocker rationale (need runtime telemetry / fixture extension); r4_impl_omega + r4_code_emission_omega Tier-2 (meta-parent + sibling redundant); no further deeper anchors discoverable without runtime artifacts
fixpoint.next_omega_cycle_trigger: user merge approved → re-run cross-engine integration audit to confirm 7 new falsifiers PASS (105+7+7=119 → 126 PASS after m3 deeper + r4 deeper) and zero collision; THEN apply same B+C pattern to m5 ordinal (8 ω-cycles + bnf + dossier) and r10 coupling systems (m10 coupling dossier + ω-cycles); after r10 deeper → cross-engine cluster fully anchored at design level; runtime invariants (I2..I10) await meta_decision_cert.jsonl + events JSONL telemetry export from r4_replan.py + meta_engine pipeline
